creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Neel Chauhan from comment #3)
I'm asking because of two reasons

#1
Porter's Handbook:
5.4.3. USE_GITHUB
"If the distribution file comes from a specific commit or tag on GitHub for which there is no officially released file"....
Where it's hosted in that regard is irrelevant

#2
~13Mbyte vs ~60Mbyte is quite a difference
